title: Adaptive SNN-PIM: RL-Driven Triple-Hybrid Architecture for Always-On Consumer AI
authors: Sridevi Navulur, Rangababu Peesapati, Subba Rao S
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: The vision for Embodied AI in consumer electronics (CE) is fundamentally blocked by the Energy Wall, where data movement costs drain battery life, preventing true Always-On operation. We propose a novel Triple-Hybrid Architecture integrating traditional processors (CPU/GPU), energy-efficient Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), and RRAM-based Processing-In-Memory (PIM). Our key innovation is the SNN-PIM Fusion Core, which performs sparse inference at the femtojoule (fJ) scale by eliminating the memory bottleneck. Orchestration is managed by an Intelligent Triple-Mode Scheduler (ITMS) enhanced with a Reinforcement Learning (RL)-Driven Adaptive Agent to dynamically route tasks based on system reliability (temperature) and battery state. Through Python simulation, high-fidelity SystemVerilog/FPGA simulations and emulation on the Intel Agilex 5 SoC, we demonstrate a 160 × power reduction in continuous sensing, validating a projected battery life extension to over 9 months on a standard coin cell. This RL-driven adaptability addresses PIM’s reliability challenges, providing a comprehensive architectural framework for sustainable, next-generation Always-On Consumer Electronics AI devices.
title_zh: 自适应SNN-PIM：面向持续运行消费级人工智能的强化学习驱动三重混合架构
abstract_zh: 消费电子领域中具身人工智能（Embodied AI）的愿景，从根本上受到“能源墙”的制约——数据移动带来的能耗损耗严重消耗电池寿命，阻碍了真正意义上的持续待机运行。为此，我们提出一种创新的三重混合架构，融合传统处理器（CPU/GPU）、能效极高的脉冲神经网络（SNNs）以及基于RRAM的存算一体（PIM）技术。我们的核心创新在于SNN-PIM融合核心，通过消除内存瓶颈，在飞焦（fJ）量级实现稀疏推理，显著降低功耗。任务调度由智能三模式调度器（ITMS）管理，并引入强化学习（RL）驱动的自适应代理，根据系统可靠性（如温度）和电池状态动态分配任务。通过Python仿真、高保真SystemVerilog/FPGA仿真以及在Intel Agilex 5 SoC平台上的硬件原型验证，我们实现了连续感知功耗降低160倍，证明在标准纽扣电池供电下，设备续航可延长至9个月以上。该强化学习驱动的自适应机制有效应对了存算一体技术在可靠性方面的挑战，为可持续的下一代持续待机型消费电子AI设备提供了一个全面的架构解决方案。

title: A Framework for Automated PCB Inspection through Gerber Files Comparison using Computer Vision and LLM
authors: Elton Alencar, Janderson Lira, Pablo H. U. de Pinho, Jair de Almeida, Luziane L. S. Arouca, Daniel Lins Da Silva, Marcel Silva, Agemilson Pimentel
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: Printed Circuit Boards (PCBs) play a critical role in the manufacturing of electronic devices, requiring accurate component placement and precise layer connections. Visual inspection ensures the correctness of PCB layouts, but manual comparison between design versions is time-consuming and prone to human error. In this paper, an AI-driven hybrid framework that integrates Computer Vision (CV) techniques with Large Language Model (LLM) is proposed to automate the detection and reporting of design changes across Gerber files. The system converts Gerber data into images, performs pixel-wise comparison using Digital Image Processing (DIP) methods, and classifies differences into additions, removals, or modifications. The extracted discrepancies are then described and summarized through technical text automatically generated by gemma3:4b, a pre-trained LLM. Experimental results with 186 comparisons demonstrated an average total processing time of 52.6 s per analysis, with report generation accounting for most of the execution time (37 s). The approach achieved consistent and accurate detection of geometric variations, reducing inspection time and reliance on multiple third-party tools. This framework provides a reliable and extensible foundation for automated PCB inspection, contributing to smarter, AI-assisted manufacturing workflows in consumer electronics, providing a centralized service that can be integrated into the company’s local infrastructure.
title_zh: 基于计算机视觉与大语言模型的Gerber文件对比自动化PCB检测框架
abstract_zh: 印刷电路板（PCB）在电子设备制造中起着至关重要的作用，其生产要求元器件位置精准、各层连接精确。视觉检测可确保PCB版图的正确性，但手动对比设计版本耗时且易出错。本文提出一种基于人工智能的混合框架，将计算机视觉（CV）技术与大语言模型（LLM）相结合，实现对Gerber文件间设计变更的自动化检测与报告。该系统将Gerber数据转换为图像，利用数字图像处理（DIP）方法进行像素级比对，并将差异分类为新增、删除或修改。随后，通过预训练的大语言模型gemma3:4b自动生成技术性文本，对提取的差异进行描述与总结。在186次对比实验中，平均每次分析总处理时间为52.6秒，其中报告生成占用了大部分时间（约37秒）。该方法实现了几何变化的稳定且准确检测，显著缩短了检查时间，减少了对多种第三方工具的依赖。该框架为PCB自动化检测提供了可靠且可扩展的基础，有助于推动消费电子领域更智能、AI辅助的制造流程，可作为集中式服务集成到企业本地基础设施中。

title: ALERT: A Closed-Loop SOC Agent for Web and API Security with CVE-Based Intelligence and Adaptive Anomaly Detection
authors: Thirawat Sooksomstarn, Qian Wu, Atsushi Kanai
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: Web and Application Programming Interface (API) services are central to modern digital infrastructure but remain vulnerable to injection attacks, authentication bypasses, and zero-day exploits. Traditional Security Operations Center (SOC) tools rely on static, signature-based pipelines that generate high false positives, struggle with concept drift, and provide limited decision support. This paper presents ALERT (Agentic Learning for Event-driven Response and Threat Detection), a lightweight, GPU-free (CPU-only), closed-loop SOC agent with a human-in-the-loop (HITL) that integrates Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE) severity prediction, log anomaly detection, and Language Model (LLM)-assisted semantics into a cost-sensitive decision framework. ALERT ingests multimodal inputs, including vulnerability feeds, runtime logs, and analyst annotations, and dynamically adjusts responses (ALLOW, MONITOR, or BLOCK) through online policy adaptation. Evaluation on a synthetic dataset of 10,000 Apache-style logs achieved a precision of 0.991, a recall of 0.983, and an F1-score of 0.987, detecting 100 percent of critical threats while keeping false positives below 0.5 percent. Designed for scalability and transparency, ALERT’s modular architecture generalizes to Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) and Internet of Things (IoT) telemetry, supporting practical, adaptive, and explainable SOC automation.
title_zh: 警报：基于CVE情报与自适应异常检测的闭环SOC代理，用于Web和API安全
abstract_zh: Web和应用程序编程接口（API）服务是现代数字基础设施的核心，但仍然容易受到注入攻击、身份认证绕过以及零日漏洞利用等威胁。传统的安全运营中心（SOC）工具依赖于静态的、基于签名的处理流程，导致误报率高，难以应对概念漂移问题，并且在决策支持方面能力有限。本文提出ALERT（面向事件驱动响应与威胁检测的智能体学习系统），这是一个轻量级、无需GPU（仅需CPU）、具备闭环运行机制的SOC智能体，采用“人在回路”（HITL）设计，将通用漏洞披露（CVE）严重性预测、日志异常检测以及语言模型（LLM）辅助语义分析整合进一个成本敏感的决策框架中。ALERT能够接收多模态输入，包括漏洞情报、运行时日志及分析师标注信息，并通过在线策略自适应动态调整响应动作（允许ALLOW、监控MONITOR或阻断BLOCK）。在包含10,000条Apache风格日志的合成数据集上的评估结果显示，ALERT实现了0.991的精确率、0.983的召回率和0.987的F1分数，成功检测出100%的关键威胁，同时将误报率控制在0.5%以下。ALERT设计注重可扩展性与透明性，其模块化架构可推广至网络物理系统（CPS）和物联网（IoT）遥测数据场景，支持实际应用中灵活、可解释的SOC自动化。

title: LLM Powered Command Line Interface Agent: A Comparative Analysis
authors: Madhisha S, Kabhinyasri S V, Aravinth Cheran K S, Pream S, Sudharsan S, Anisha C D
publish: 2026 Second International Conference on Intelligent Systems for Communication, IoT and Security (ICISCoIS)
abstract: The paper presents a local offline Command Line Interface (CLI) agent powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) which understands natural language given by the user and converts it into the required Bash command. By enabling the user to interact with the agent via the terminal in natural language, the proposed system overcomes the usability gap as developer surveys convey that 69 % of the developers use the terminal frequently while only 19 % of them consider themselves as experts and 70 % find it difficult to remember the commands. This shows the need for more user friendly and easily accessible tools. To address this, the paper introduces an LLM powered CLI agent that uses Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) which retrieves relevant commands from the local database using FAISS and provides this retrieved relevant commands to the LLM which helps to generate the Bash commands more accurately. Additionally, the system incorporates a safety filter to prevent the execution of dangerous commands and executes only after getting user confirmation. A comparative analysis of several LLMs was performed and among those Mistral 7B achieved the highest accuracy of 70.7 %, followed by Code Llama 7 B with 63.7 %, Qwen 2.5 (1.5B) and Gemma 2 (2B) performed similarly with 50.7 % and 52.7 % respectively and the lowest accuracy of 41.7 % given by Llama 2 (7B). The system's ability to generate more accurate bash commands for developers is evident from these results.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的命令行界面代理：一项对比分析
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种由大型语言模型（LLM）驱动的本地离线命令行界面（CLI）代理，该代理能够理解用户输入的自然语言，并将其转换为所需的 Bash 命令。通过允许用户以自然语言与代理在终端中进行交互，所提出的系统克服了使用上的障碍。开发者调查显示，69% 的开发者经常使用终端，但仅有 19% 认为自己是专家，70% 的人表示难以记住命令。这表明迫切需要更友好、更易访问的工具。为此，本文引入了一个基于 LLM 的 CLI 代理，采用检索增强生成（RAG）技术：利用 FAISS 从本地数据库中检索相关命令，并将这些检索到的相关命令提供给 LLM，从而帮助其更准确地生成 Bash 命令。此外，系统还集成了安全过滤机制，防止危险命令的执行，仅在获得用户确认后才执行。对多个 LLM 进行了对比分析，结果显示 Mistral 7B 达到最高准确率 70.7%，其次是 Code Llama 7B 的 63.7%；Qwen 2.5（1.5B）和 Gemma 2（2B）表现相近，分别为 50.7% 和 52.7%；而 Llama 2（7B）的准确率最低，为 41.7%。这些结果充分表明，该系统能够为开发者生成更准确的 Bash 命令。

title: Memory Safety in Linux Device Drivers: Enhancing Security with Formal Verification
authors: Janislley O. Sousa, David A. O. Ferreira, Eddie B. De Lima Filho, Lucas C. Cordeiro
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: Memory safety remains one of the most critical challenges in embedded systems, particularly within the Linux kernel, where device drivers are a primary source of vulnerabilities due to their close interaction with hardware and complex execution contexts. Such behavior is even more pronounced on consumer electronics devices, where restricted resources amplify the existing vulnerabilities. Traditional testing approaches, while effective at uncovering shallow bugs, often fail to guarantee the absence of subtle or deeply nested memory-safety issues. In this paper, we propose a formal verification methodology based on Bounded Model Checking (BMC) to detect memory-safety violations in Linux device drivers. Using a methodology based on LSVerifier, we systematically analyzed newly integrated device drivers across multiple kernel versions. Our approach uncovered three vulnerabilities, including out-of-bounds writes, out-of-bounds reads, and null pointer dereferences. It demonstrates that formal methods can uncover critical flaws early in the development process, complementing dynamic tools and strengthening kernel security.
title_zh: Linux设备驱动程序中的内存安全：通过形式化验证提升安全性
abstract_zh: 内存安全仍然是嵌入式系统中最为关键的挑战之一，尤其是在Linux内核中，设备驱动程序由于与硬件紧密交互以及复杂的执行上下文，成为漏洞的主要来源。在消费类电子设备上，这种问题尤为突出，因为资源受限进一步放大了已有的安全隐患。传统的测试方法虽然能够发现一些浅层缺陷，但往往无法保证彻底消除细微或深层嵌套的内存安全问题。本文提出一种基于有界模型检测（Bounded Model Checking, BMC）的形式化验证方法，用于检测Linux设备驱动程序中的内存安全违规行为。我们采用基于LSVerifier的方法，对多个内核版本中新集成的设备驱动程序进行了系统性分析。该方法共发现了三处漏洞，包括越界写入、越界读取以及空指针解引用。结果表明，形式化方法能够在开发早期发现关键缺陷，有效补充动态分析工具，从而增强内核的安全性。

title: When Bigger Isn’t Stronger: Reassessing Security in Hardware Obfuscation
authors: Sonam Sharma, Dipanjan Roy, Digambar Pawar
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: Existing obfuscation techniques at the High Level Synthesis (HLS) stage largely focus on maximizing the Key Search Space (KSS) for higher security, assuming that a larger number of keys guarantees stronger protection. However, bigger isn’t necessarily stronger, since many keys can be functionally redundant, and yield the same behavior. Such redundancy inflates the perceived security without actually strengthening the design. Moreover, maximizing KSS typically requires inserting more OUs, which increases power, area, and delay overhead without proportionally improving security. To address these limitations, this work introduces the EQUILIBRIUM framework, which evaluates obfuscation strength in terms of functional diversity, the number of unique functionalities generated by an obfuscated design. EQUILIBRIUM identifies redundant keys, and explores resource configurations that achieve a perfect balance between higher security, and lower design overhead. Experimental results indicate that the proposed framework can be integrated with any existing HLS-based obfuscation methodology to effectively enhance their obfuscation strength, as evaluated using SCORE.
title_zh: 越大并不越强：重新审视硬件混淆中的安全性
abstract_zh: 现有的高层次综合（HLS）阶段混淆技术大多聚焦于最大化密钥搜索空间（KSS），以提升安全性，其假设是密钥数量越多，保护能力越强。然而，“数量多”并不等于“强度高”，因为许多密钥在功能上可能是冗余的，会产生相同的行为。这种冗余虽然夸大了安全性的感知，却并未真正增强设计的安全性。此外，最大化KSS通常需要插入更多的可配置单元（OUs），这会带来功耗、面积和延迟的额外开销，而这些代价并未带来相应程度的安全性提升。为解决上述局限性，本文提出EQUILIBRIUM框架，该框架从功能多样性角度评估混淆强度——即一个混淆设计所能生成的独特功能数量。EQUILIBRIUM能够识别出冗余密钥，并探索在更高安全性与更低设计开销之间实现完美平衡的资源配置方案。实验结果表明，所提出的框架可无缝集成到任何现有的基于HLS的混淆方法中，通过SCORE评估指标有效提升其混淆强度。

title:
MA
                    <sup>2</sup>
                    -VD: Cross-Modal Vulnerability Detection Across Source and Binary Code via Modal Adapters and Memory Alignment
authors: Qinghao Li, Jizhong Li, Chunling Liu, Tieming Liu
publish: 2026 2nd International Conference on Electrical Automation and Artificial Intelligence (ICEAAI)
abstract: Vulnerability detection across source and binary code is an important yet challenging task in software security research. Existing deep learning methods are mostly limited to a single modality and fail to effectively leverage complementary feature information between source and binary codes, thereby limiting detection capabilities and application scenarios. In this paper, we propose a cross-modal vulnerability detection framework based on modal adapters and memory alignment, <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\text{MA}^{2}$</tex>-VD. Specifically, we first address heterogeneity differences across modalities using modality-specific adapters. Then, we construct a cross-modal feature memory bank based on FAISS, which implicitly aligns features by dynamically retrieving matching cross-modal features during inference to achieve memory alignment. We evaluated <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\text{MA}^{2}$</tex>-VD on the dual-modal NVD dataset that contains both source and binary code samples. The results show that <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\text{MA}^{2}$</tex>-VD outperforms the existing baseline methods by <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$5.21 \%, 1.23 \%, 9.86 \%$</tex>, and 5.71 % in terms of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$F 1$</tex>-score, precision, recall, and accuracy, respectively. Ablation studies and incremental experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\text{MA}^{2}$</tex>-VD in cross-modal vulnerability detection.
title_zh: MA²-VD：通过模态适配器和内存对齐实现源代码与二进制代码间的跨模态漏洞检测
abstract_zh: 跨源代码与二进制代码的漏洞检测是软件安全研究中一项重要但极具挑战性的任务。现有的深度学习方法大多局限于单一模态，难以有效利用源代码与二进制代码之间的互补特征信息，从而限制了检测能力及应用场景的拓展。本文提出一种基于模态适配器与内存对齐的跨模态漏洞检测框架——MA²-VD。具体而言，我们首先通过模态特定的适配器来缓解不同模态间的异构性差异；随后，基于FAISS构建跨模态特征记忆库，在推理过程中通过动态检索匹配的跨模态特征，实现隐式特征对齐，从而完成内存对齐。我们在包含源代码与二进制代码样本的双模态NVD数据集上对MA²-VD进行了评估。实验结果表明，相较于现有基线方法，MA²-VD在F1-score、精确率、召回率和准确率上分别提升了5.21%、1.23%、9.86%和5.71%。消融实验与增量实验进一步验证了MA²-VD在跨模态漏洞检测中的有效性。

title: A Generative-AI Approach to Validating Blank Selections for Phrase Fill-in-Blank Problems in Web-Client Programming Learning Assistant System
authors: Zhikang Li, Huiyu Qi, Nobuo Funabiki, Htoo Htoo Sandi Kyaw, Wen-Chung Kao
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: Dynamic web-client programming with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript has become dominant in web application system. To assist its study by novices, we have developed a Phrase Fill-in-Blank Problem (PFP) in the Web-client Programming Learning Assistant System (Web-PLAS). Any answer is marked through string matching with the correct one. However, the current blank phrase selection algorithm implemented for helping a teacher to make a new PFP instance may not select blanks having unique answers. In this paper, we investigate a generative-AI approach to validating the selected blank phrases by the algorithm. In this approach, we first change the name of any user-defined identifier in a code so that the AI cannot use a memorized code for the answer. Then, we check the validity of the selected blanks by asking the AI to find their correct answers. After that, we repeat selecting a new phrase for blank and validating it by asking the AI to find the correct answer, until no new phrase can be selected. In either case, if the AI cannot find the correct answer, the blank is discarded. For preliminary evaluations, we manually apply this approach to the 10 PFP instances for basic topics in our previous study, using MS Copilot. The results show that several blanks in existing instances are not correct and additional blanks can be selected. The implementation of a program to automate the approach and its comprehensive evaluations with various codes will be in our next study.
title_zh: 一种基于生成式人工智能的填空题空白选项验证方法在Web客户端编程学习助手系统中的应用
abstract_zh: 使用HTML、CSS和JavaScript进行动态Web客户端编程已成为Web应用系统中的主流技术。为了帮助初学者学习，我们开发了一种“填空题”（Phrase Fill-in-the-Blank Problem, PFP），并将其集成到Web客户端编程学习辅助系统（Web-PLAS）中。在该系统中，任何答案都通过与正确答案进行字符串匹配来判定。然而，当前用于帮助教师创建新PFP实例的空白短语选择算法，可能无法确保所选空白具有唯一且正确的答案。本文提出一种基于生成式AI的方法，用于验证该算法所选空白短语的有效性。具体方法如下：首先，对代码中的任意用户自定义标识符名称进行更改，以防止AI利用记忆中的代码作为答案；然后，通过向AI提问，要求其找出这些空白处的正确答案，从而检验所选空白的有效性。接着，重复这一过程：为空白选择新的短语，并再次通过AI验证其正确答案是否存在，直到无法再选出新的有效短语为止。无论哪种情况，若AI无法找到正确答案，则该空白将被舍弃。在初步评估中，我们手动采用该方法对先前研究中关于基础主题的10个PFP实例进行了测试，使用了MS Copilot作为AI工具。结果表明，现有实例中存在多个不合理的空白，同时还可以发现并添加更多有效的空白。下一步研究将实现该方法的自动化程序，并对多种代码样本进行全面评估。

title: LLM-based text-to-JQL Generation: an automated test using execution and structural indicators
authors: Rayfran Rocha Lima, Irineu Evangelista Cruz de Brito, Jardel da Cunha Nascimento, Luiz Cordovil-Jr
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: Evaluating natural language to query language (NL-to-QL) systems cannot rely on string matching alone, especially when queries involve dynamic data or complex query languages. We present APOLLO, an automated test framework that executes generated queries by Large Language Models (LLMs) against a live Jira instance, enabling execution-aware evaluation and detailed error diagnosis across syntax, unsupported features, and value inaccuracies. APOLLO introduces new metrics—field accuracy, value accuracy, and inference accuracy—that capture correctness beyond similarity. Using APOLLO, we evaluated two LLM-based conversion architectures: a retrieval-augmented generator and a specialized API-supported generation model that demonstrated both limitations and alternatives to address the drawbacks of generating dynamic non-pre-trained data. Future work will extend the framework to additional query languages, explore automated remediation strategies, and investigate richer semantic metrics for deeper diagnostic insight.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的文本到JQL生成：一种使用执行和结构指标的自动化测试
abstract_zh: 评估自然语言到查询语言（NL-to-QL）系统不能仅依赖字符串匹配，尤其是在查询涉及动态数据或复杂查询语言时。我们提出了APOLLO，一个自动化测试框架，该框架通过在实际运行的Jira实例上执行大型语言模型（LLM）生成的查询，实现执行感知的评估，并对语法错误、不支持的功能以及数值不准确等问题进行详细诊断。APOLLO引入了三项新指标——字段准确率、值准确率和推理准确率，这些指标能够衡量超越相似性的正确性。利用APOLLO，我们评估了两种基于LLM的转换架构：一种是增强检索的生成器，另一种是专门支持API的生成模型，后者展示了在生成动态非预训练数据方面的局限性及替代方案。未来的工作将把该框架扩展至更多查询语言，探索自动修复策略，并研究更丰富的语义度量，以获得更深入的诊断洞察。

title: Utilizing Chain of Thought to Generate Code from Challenging Programming Requirements
authors: EmanAlofi, RehabIbrahim, AmnehAlAbdi
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: With the rise in using Large Language Models (LLMs), research proved the feasibility of using LLMs in various software engineering tasks including code generation. However, it remains a major challenge to ensure the correctness and the efficiency of the LLM-generated code. This paper applies the "Chain-of-thought" prompting approach to improve GPT performance in code generation and its ability to convert coding requirements from HackerRank and LeetCode online coding platforms into correct Python, C++, and JavaScript code. We evaluated the performance of GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 across 558 programming challenges on HackerRank and LeetCode platforms. Our evaluation framework employed a comprehensive test case validation system, where each generated solution was tested against predefined input-output pairs, with success determined by exact matches between expected and actual outputs. The evaluation revealed significant variations in success rates across platforms (HackerRank: 46.83% vs. LeetCode: 7.35%) and programming languages (Python leading with 28.6% overall success rate). These results demonstrate that while the chain of thought approach enhances code generation accuracy, particularly for structured programming tasks, significant challenges remain in handling complex algorithmic problems.
title_zh: 利用思维链（Chain of Thought）从复杂的编程需求生成代码
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）的广泛应用，研究已证明其在代码生成等软件工程任务中的可行性。然而，确保LLM生成代码的正确性和效率仍是重大挑战。本文采用“思维链”（Chain-of-thought）提示方法，以提升GPT在代码生成方面的表现，以及将其从HackerRank和LeetCode在线编程平台获取的编程需求转化为正确Python、C++和JavaScript代码的能力。我们对GPT-3.5和GPT-4在HackerRank与LeetCode平台上的558个编程挑战进行了评估。评估框架采用全面的测试用例验证系统，每个生成的解决方案均通过预定义的输入-输出对进行测试，成功判定标准为预期输出与实际输出完全一致。评估结果表明，不同平台间的成功率存在显著差异（HackerRank：46.83% vs. LeetCode：7.35%），不同编程语言的表现也各不相同（Python总体成功率最高，达28.6%）。这些结果表明，尽管思维链方法能有效提升代码生成的准确性，尤其是在结构化编程任务中，但在处理复杂算法问题方面仍面临巨大挑战。

title: Integrating AI Development Tools in the Classroom: A Multi-Tool Case Study on Learning Outcomes and Code Quality
authors: Antonio Carlos Bento, Marcos Ribeiro Pereira-Barretto, José Reinaldo Silva, Sérgio Camacho-León, Elsa Yolanda Torres-Torres
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Teacher Education (ICAITE)
abstract: This study investigates the integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI)-assisted development tools—GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Cursor, Gemini, and Replit—within an innovative project-based software engineering course. Through a 10-week case study with 25 undergraduate students developing a CRM system, we employed a mixed-methods approach to evaluate both quantitative efficiency gains and qualitative learning outcomes. The results demonstrate that AI tools can accelerate development, yielding 30-40% time savings in prototyping and debugging tasks. However, the study crucially reveals that these efficiency benefits are contingent on structured human oversight; without it, code quality and architectural integrity can be compromised. Pedagogically, the tools served as effective catalysts for skill development but also highlighted risks of over-reliance. This research contributes a practical framework for the balanced integration of AI in engineering education, positioning these tools as powerful assistants rather than replacements. The approach supports Sustainable Development Goal 4 (Quality Education), a claim bolstered by a 96% student satisfaction rate, indicating that structured AI adoption can enhance both educational equity and engagement while preparing students for a transformed technological landscape.
title_zh: 在课堂中整合人工智能开发工具：学习成果与代码质量的多工具案例研究
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了人工智能（AI）辅助开发工具——GitHub Copilot、ChatGPT、Cursor、Gemini 和 Replit——在一项创新的项目式软件工程课程中的整合应用。通过为期10周的案例研究，25名本科生共同开发一个客户关系管理系统（CRM），我们采用混合方法评估了开发效率的量化提升与学习成果的质性变化。研究结果表明，AI工具能够显著加快开发进程，在原型设计和调试任务中实现30%-40%的时间节省。然而，研究关键发现：这些效率优势依赖于有结构的人类监督；若缺乏有效监管，代码质量与系统架构完整性可能受到损害。从教学角度看，这些工具有效促进了学生技能的发展，但也暴露出过度依赖的风险。本研究提出了一套切实可行的框架，指导AI在工程教育中的平衡整合，将这些工具定位为强大的辅助角色而非替代品。该方法支持联合国可持续发展目标4（优质教育），这一主张得到96%的学生满意度数据有力支撑，表明有组织地引入AI技术不仅有助于提升教育公平性与学习参与度，更能帮助学生适应未来变革中的技术环境。

title: Compiler.next: A Search-Based Compiler to Power the AI-Native Future of Software Engineering
authors: Filipe R. Cogo, Gustavo A. Oliva, Ahmed E. Hassan
publish: ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology
abstract: None
title_zh: Compiler.next：一种基于搜索的编译器，以推动软件工程的AI原生未来
abstract_zh: None

title: Double-Scale LLM Cooperation for Internet of Agents-Oriented Robot Scenarios
authors: Longyu Zhou, Wenjiao Feng, Yijing Liu, Supeng Leng, Tony Quek
publish: IEEE Communications Magazine
abstract: The evaluation from the Internet of Things (IoT) to the Internet of Everything (IoE) has achieved the intelligent connection among massive IoT devices. In this context, the emerging Internet of Agents (IoA) is emerging to perform a fundamental shift in the digital paradigm for intelligent cognition. The IoA is expected to enable autonomous cooperation for intelligent applications, such as robots-based intelligent logistics. The IoA can envision a cognition-centric ecosystem in which intelligent robots perform cooperative sensing and reasoning. To achieve this goal, this article designs a terminal-edge cooperative Large Language Model (LLM) framework. It can achieve accurate service provisions by integrating cross-layer computing resources for IoA scenarios. In addition, our framework can enable robots to perform autonomous decision-making instead of requesting from the cloud or the edge servers for real-time service provisions. Based on our framework, we provide several potential IoA scenarios with detailed analysis. A case study of robots-based parcel sorting and handling is selected to validate the feasibility and effectiveness of our framework. The experiment results show that our framework achieves a high parcel sorting accuracy of up to 95% with a low delivery latency of under 1 second compared to traditional centralized manners on average, respectively.
title_zh: 面向智能体互联网的机器人场景中的双尺度大模型协作
abstract_zh: 从物联网（IoT）到万物互联（IoE）的演进，已实现海量物联网设备之间的智能连接。在此背景下，新兴的“智能体互联网”（Internet of Agents, IoA）正推动数字范式在智能认知层面的根本性转变。IoA有望实现智能应用的自主协同，例如基于机器人的智能物流系统。IoA可构想一个以认知为核心的生态系统，在该系统中，智能机器人能够开展协同感知与推理。为实现这一目标，本文设计了一种终端-边缘协同的大语言模型（LLM）框架，通过整合跨层计算资源，可在IoA场景中实现精准的服务供给。此外，本框架使机器人能够自主决策，无需向云端或边缘服务器请求，从而实现实时服务响应。基于该框架，本文进一步探讨了多个潜在的IoA应用场景，并以基于机器人的包裹分拣与处理为例进行案例研究，验证了所提框架的可行性和有效性。实验结果表明，相较于传统的集中式方法，本框架在平均情况下实现了高达95%的包裹分拣准确率，同时交付延迟低于1秒，显著提升了效率与实时性。

title: BlockGuard: A PureChain Safety Framework for Agent Validation in Mission-Critical Systems
authors: Raneem Khafagy, Paul Angelo Oroceo, Jae Min Lee, Dong-Seong Kim
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: Large Language Model agents show increasing potential for mission-critical edge environments, including autonomous drones, smart grid controllers, and industrial automation systems. However, the non-deterministic nature of LLMs poses significant safety risks when deployed in physical systems where erroneous decisions can lead to catastrophic failures. We present BlockGuard, a blockchain-anchored safety framework that binds agent actions to immutable, verifiable safety policies. The system employs a fast-path local validator for real-time deterministic enforcement, while PureChain smart contracts operate in a slow-path role to provide post-decision immutability, auditability, and policy provenance. PureChain does not sit on the real-time control loop; instead, it provides authoritative evidence, dispute resolution, and compliance guarantees without impacting control latency. Through simulation-based validation across 150 industrial control scenarios, BlockGuard blocked 100% of unsafe actions with a mean validation latency of 25.9 ms and 32.6 ms (with twin). Twin anchoring improved latency stability, bounding worst-case checks to ≤ 101 ms versus 272 ms spikes in baseline; explainability recall and audit completeness were both 1.0.
title_zh: BlockGuard：一种用于关键任务系统中智能体验证的纯链安全框架
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型代理在任务关键型边缘环境中展现出日益增长的潜力，涵盖自主无人机、智能电网控制器以及工业自动化系统等。然而，由于LLM固有的非确定性特征，在物理系统中部署时可能带来重大安全风险，错误决策可能导致灾难性后果。我们提出BlockGuard——一种基于区块链锚定的安全框架，将代理行为与不可篡改、可验证的安全策略绑定。该系统采用快速路径本地验证器实现实时确定性执行，而PureChain智能合约则以慢速路径角色提供决策后的不可篡改性、可审计性及策略溯源能力。PureChain不参与实时控制回路，而是通过提供权威证据、争议解决和合规保障，在不影响控制延迟的前提下确保系统安全性。通过在150个工业控制场景中的仿真验证，BlockGuard成功阻止了100%的不安全操作，平均验证延迟为25.9毫秒（使用孪生机制时为32.6毫秒）。孪生锚定显著提升了延迟稳定性，最坏情况检查时间被控制在≤101毫秒，相较基线的272毫秒峰值大幅降低；可解释性召回率与审计完整性均达到1.0。

title: Mono Instruction Set Computer design using a high-level hardware description language
authors: Nobuya Watanabe, Minoru Watanabe
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: Reduced instruction set computer (RISC) processors are built on the philosophy of eliminating complex instructions and of limiting the instruction set to only simple operations, thereby emphasizing fast execution. This approach has been adopted in many modern processors. Extending the RISC concept even further, we propose mono instruction set computer (MISC) architecture, which constrains the number of instructions on a processor to a single instruction. Because a MISC processor contains only a single instruction, in order to execute a variety of instructions, MISC processors must be implemented onto a programmable architecture and its configuration must be done frequently. Existing FPGAs can not achieve a high-performance MISC processor due to their long reconfiguration time. Therefore, we have been developing an optically reconfigurable gate array (ORGA) that supports high-speed dynamic reconfiguration. The ORGA can realize an ideal platform for MISC processors. In this research, we designed MISC processors based on RISC-V processor using the high-level hardware description language FSL. The design has been implemented onto an FPGA. This paper presents the evaluated results.
title_zh: 使用高级硬件描述语言设计单指令集计算机
abstract_zh: 精简指令集计算机（RISC）处理器基于一种理念，即消除复杂的指令，将指令集限制为仅包含简单的操作，从而强调快速执行。这一设计理念已被广泛应用于许多现代处理器中。在此基础上，我们进一步提出单指令集计算机（MISC）架构，其将处理器的指令数量限制为单一指令。由于MISC处理器仅包含一条指令，为了实现多种功能，必须将其部署在可编程架构上，并频繁进行配置。然而，现有的FPGA由于重构时间较长，无法实现高性能的MISC处理器。因此，我们正在开发一种光学可重构门阵列（ORGA），该技术支持高速动态重构，能够为MISC处理器提供理想的实现平台。在本研究中，我们基于RISC-V处理器架构，采用高级硬件描述语言FSL设计了MISC处理器，并已将其在FPGA上实现。本文将展示相关评估结果。

title: GEN AI Enabled Wearable for Early Detection of Sleep Apnea Using NXP I.MX RT1060 and GW1N- LV1LQ144C6/I5 FPGA
authors: Karthikeyan A, Balasrinivasan S A, Ashega S, Hamsa Ramyaa P, Harish S S
publish: 2026 Second International Conference on Intelligent Systems for Communication, IoT and Security (ICISCoIS)
abstract: Sleep apnea is a common respiratory disorder that is often left undiagnosed, however, has serious negative impacts on cardiovascular health as well as the quality of sleep in general. This manuscript presents a miniaturized and wearable non-invasive system for sleep apnea detection to realize real-time detection to monitor and intelligently analyze physiological signals continuously. The architecture consists of an NXP i.MX RT1060 microcontroller with a GOWIN GW1N-LV1LQ144C6/I5 field-programmable gate array [FPGA] in order to achieve the parallel acquisition and processing of biosignals. Respiration, snoring and photoplethysmography (PPG) are monitored by AD8233 analog front end, CMM-4030DB-26354-TR MEMS microphone and MAXM86161EFD+T PPG sensor, respectively. Signal conditioning (Switching Kalman filtering, Adaptive filtering Verilog HDL on the FPGA verification with Cadence SimVision in simulations and stable waveform tracking and accurate switching of models. Features extracted have been categorized using a Convolution Neural Network (CNN) which is lightweight and has been implemented on the microcontroller, and it achieved a detection accuracy of 94.6 %. On detecting aberrant respiratory patterns, the system provides realtime haptic feedback via an <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$8 ~\text{mm} * 2 ~\text{mm}$</tex> ERM coin vibration motor as well as Generative AI assisted plain language summaries, along with actionable suggestions, including explanations for apnea episodes, guidance on sleeping positions, alcohol avoidance, and encouragement to consult a physician. Powered with 3.7V 500mAh Li-Po Battery (WLY752530), device works in an energy-efficient manner. Experimental results validate the low latency (approximately 1.2 milliseconds) and very precise results for apnea detection that provide valuable health feedback for actions, which has demonstrated a cost efficient and power efficient algorithmic optimized human health monitoring using signal processing on FPGAs and artificial intelligence embedded in the system.
title_zh: 基于NXP I.MX RT1060与GW1N-LV1LQ144C6/I5 FPGA的生成式人工智能可穿戴设备，用于睡眠呼吸暂停早期检测
abstract_zh: 睡眠呼吸暂停是一种常见的呼吸系统疾病，常常未被诊断，但对心血管健康以及整体睡眠质量具有严重的负面影响。本文提出了一种微型化、可穿戴的非侵入式系统，用于实时检测睡眠呼吸暂停，以实现对生理信号的持续监测与智能分析。该系统架构采用NXP i.MX RT1060微控制器，并集成GOWIN GW1N-LV1LQ144C6/I5现场可编程门阵列（FPGA），以实现生物信号的并行采集与处理。通过AD8233模拟前端监测呼吸信号，使用CMM-4030DB-26354-TR MEMS麦克风检测打鼾信号，利用MAXM86161EFD+T PPG传感器采集光电容积脉搏波信号。信号调理部分采用开关卡尔曼滤波和自适应滤波技术，其Verilog HDL代码已在Cadence SimVision中完成仿真验证，确保波形跟踪稳定且模型切换准确。提取的特征通过轻量级卷积神经网络（CNN）进行分类，该模型已部署于微控制器上，实现了94.6%的检测准确率。当系统识别出异常呼吸模式时，会通过一个8 mm × 2 mm的ERM偏心旋转质量（ERM）振动马达提供实时触觉反馈，并结合生成式人工智能生成通俗易懂的健康摘要，同时给出可操作建议，包括对呼吸暂停事件的解释、睡姿指导、避免饮酒，以及鼓励及时就医等。设备由3.7V 500mAh锂聚合物电池（WLY752530）供电，运行功耗极低，具备出色的能效表现。实验结果验证了系统具有极低延迟（约1.2毫秒）和高度精确的呼吸暂停检测能力，为用户提供了有价值的健康反馈。本研究展示了一种成本低廉、功耗高效的算法优化方案，通过在FPGA上进行信号处理，并嵌入人工智能技术，实现了面向人体健康的智能化监测。

title: Invited: Infusing EDA Knowledge into LLM Systems: An Information-Source Perspective
authors: Yuhan Qin, Yuan Pu, Tairu Qiu, Zhuolun He, Bei Yu
publish: Proceedings of the 2026 International Symposium on Physical Design
abstract: None
title_zh: 邀请：将EDA知识融入LLM系统：一种信息源视角
abstract_zh: None
